calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2022 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Continuing Hearing Re: Petition Of Tamara Lynette Clark To Perpetuate Testimony Of Roderick Johnston By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Tamara Lynette Clark to Perpetuate Testimony of Roderick Johnston by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 2035.010. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SKF)
